name: std-recurrence
description: std-recurrence — recurring-rule definition + upcoming runs (Stripe Subscriptions / Cron Hub style). The viewing state shows a plain-English rule sentence and the next N dated runs as an agenda timeline. Per-run exception modal supports skip / reschedule. Topology = loading / defining_rule / viewing / awaiting_exception_decision / cancelled / error.

schema.name: std-recurrence
schema.description: std-recurrence — recurring-rule definition + upcoming runs (Stripe Subscriptions / Cron Hub style). The viewing state shows a plain-English rule sentence and the next N dated runs as an agenda timeline. Per-run exception modal supports skip / reschedule. Topology = loading / defining_rule / viewing / awaiting_exception_decision / cancelled / error.

fields.name: title
fields.description: A short, user-friendly name for the recurrence.

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Free-form text providing additional information or context.

fields.name: date
fields.description: The date associated with this occurrence.
fields.synonyms: due date, scheduled date, run date

fields.name: occurrences
fields.description: A list of scheduled event instances.

fields.name: interval
fields.description: The number of time units between occurrences.

fields.name: startDate
fields.description: The date when the recurrence begins.
fields.synonyms: start date, begin date, initial date

fields.name: endDate
fields.description: The date when the recurrence ends.
fields.synonyms: end date, termination date, final date

fields.name: endAfterCount
fields.description: The number of occurrences after which the recurrence ends.

fields.name: summaryText
fields.description: A human-readable summary of the recurrence rule.

fields.name: currentOccurrenceId
fields.description: Unique identifier for the currently active occurrence.
fields.synonyms: occurrence ID, run ID, current run

fields.name: currentOccurrenceDate
fields.description: The date of the currently active occurrence.
fields.synonyms: occurrence date, current date, run date

fields.name: currentOccurrenceLabel
fields.description: A human-readable label for the current occurrence.

fields.name: rescheduleDate
fields.description: The date to which the recurrence is rescheduled.
fields.synonyms: new date, replacement date, revised date

fields.name: skipReason
fields.description: Reason provided when skipping a scheduled occurrence.

fields.name: errorMessage
fields.description: Error message displayed to the user.

emits.description: Signals the rule definition is being modified.
Signals that the recurrence rule has been successfully saved.
Signals the rule has been removed or deactivated.
Signals a per-run exception modal is opening.
Indicates the exception modal has been closed.
Indicates a scheduled occurrence has been skipped.
Signals a scheduled occurrence has been moved to a new date/time.
Signals a scheduled occurrence has been cancelled.
Initiates a re-execution of the recurrence rule.
Signals successful loading of the recurrence rule and schedule.
Indicates failure to load recurrence rule data.
emits.synonyms: load error, failed load, data error

emits.description: Indicates the recurrence rule has been successfully saved.
Indicates that saving the recurrence rule failed.

events.name: Recurrence loaded
events.description: Signals successful loading of the recurrence rule and schedule.

events.name: Recurrence load failed
events.description: Indicates failure to load recurrence rule data.
events.synonyms: load error, failed load, data error

events.name: Recurrence saved
events.description: Indicates the recurrence rule has been successfully saved.

events.name: Recurrence save failed
events.description: Indicates that saving the recurrence rule failed.

events.name: Edit Rule
events.description: Signals the rule definition is being modified.

events.name: Open Exception
events.description: Signals a per-run exception modal is opening.

events.name: Cancel Schedule
events.description: Signals a scheduled occurrence has been cancelled.

events.name: Save Rule
events.description: Signals that the recurrence rule has been successfully saved.

events.name: Cancel Rule
events.description: Signals the rule has been removed or deactivated.

events.name: Skip Occurrence
events.description: Indicates a scheduled occurrence has been skipped.

events.name: Reschedule Occurrence
events.description: Signals a scheduled occurrence has been moved to a new date/time.

events.name: Close Exception
events.description: Indicates the exception modal has been closed.

events.name: Restart
events.description: Initiates a re-execution of the recurrence rule.

children.content: What would you like to do with this occurrence?
This recurring schedule has been cancelled. No further occurrences will fire.

title.label: Section title
title.description: Heading shown above the recurrence editor

timelineLook.label: Timeline look
timelineLook.description: Layer 2 visual treatment for the timeline.

formFields.label: Rule fields
formFields.description: Inputs shown in the recurrence-rule definition form

cardLook.label: Card look
